name: camp_entrance
_comment: User 2026-05-31 (#1): PP was standing on air. Walkable foot band ~x8..x1354 at foot y≈672-791 (walk line ~728). minY/maxY clamp PP's top-left so his foot (top+270) stays in that band: minY=672-270=402, maxY=791-270=521. spawnY=458 → foot ~728.
_comment_walk: FOOT lines (footWalk=true): these are where PP's FEET walk, so the F3 yellow line and the green foot crosshair now coincide and a click lands his feet on the line. Line 1 = the clearing in front of the fence (foot y=735). Line 2 = the dirt path running UP to the gate opening, ending at the threshold the user pointed at: (778,546). Click up the path and PP's feet climb to the gate. Entrance Higgins moved off this line (npc.go: X 760 -> 820) so he greets beside the gate, not on the path.
